feed.title: Maine Judicial Branch Jury Status Notices
feed.subtitle: Table of per-county jury reporting status notices with no reliable per-row link; monitored by full-page fingerprint.

entry.title: Page updated: Maine Judicial Branch Jury Status Notices
entry.content: This page's content changed since the last check. No structured items could be extracted automatically; visit the page directly to review the update.

entry.title: Page updated: Maine Judicial Branch Jury Status Notices
entry.content: This page's content changed since the last check. Visit the page directly to review the update. What changed (text excerpt): Added: + Jurors selected in the matter of State v Jordan are to report for trial at 9:00am on Monday July 6th. Please report to the Jury Assembly room on the second floor of the Cumberland County Courthouse in Portland. + All June 2026 trial jurors who have not been selected for the case mentioned previously are no longer expected to check this website or report for jury selection. Your jury service is now completed for 5 years with the thanks of the court! Removed: - Jurors selected in the matter of State v O’Donnell are no longer expected to report for trial on Tuesday, June 30th as the case has resolved. - Jurors selected in the matter of State v Jordan are to check this website after 6:00PM on Thursday, July 2 - nd - for reporting instructions for trial on Monday, July 6 - th - . - All June 2026 trial jurors who have not been selected for the cases mentioned previously are no longer expected to check this website or report for jury selection. Your jury service is now completed for 5 years with the thanks of the court!

entry.title: Page updated: Maine Judicial Branch Jury Status Notices
entry.content:
This page's content changed since the last check. Visit the page directly to review the update.
What changed (text excerpt): Added: + **July/August Traverse Jury** Will need to report for Jury Housekeeping on Wed July 8th at the time on your summons. Jurors #1-100 at 9am, Jurors #101-200 at 11am. Jury Selection will be held on Thurs July 9th at 8:30am. **Please note that August dates have changed: Housekeeping will be held on Wed Aug 5th at 9am (approx 1 hr), Jury Selection Thurs Aug 6th at 9am and Fri Aug 7th at 9am. Plan to appear unless the Clerk has told you that you do not need to report. Thank you.** Removed: - **July/August Traverse Jury** Will need to report for Jury Housekeeping on Wed July 8th at the time on your summons. Jurors #1-100 at 9am, Jurors #101-200 at 11am. Jury Selection will be held on Thurs July 9th at 8:30am.

entry.title: Page updated: Maine Judicial Branch Jury Status Notices
entry.content:
This page's content changed since the last check. Visit the page directly to review the update.
What changed (text excerpt): Added: + Knox Traverse Jurors who have not previously been excused or postponed are to report on Tuesday July 7,2026 9:30 am UNLESS your juror number is listed below: + 3,6,20,26,36,37,44,47,56,58,60,62,74,84,91,99,103,117,122,123,131,136,140,143,146,161,162,165,174,177,192,207,212,217,243 and 247. If your number is listed, you do not need to report and your jury service is complete. Removed: - Traverse Jurors are to report on Friday June 26,2026 at the following times; Jurors # 1-100 at 9:00am; Jurors # 101-200 at 10:30am; Jurors # 201-250 at 1:00pm.

entry.title: Page updated: Maine Judicial Branch Jury Status Notices
entry.content:
This page's content changed since the last check. Visit the page directly to review the update.
What changed (text excerpt): Added: + All jurors who were summonsed for July 10, 2026, need to appear at the Oxford County Superior Court @ 8:30 a.m. for jury selection. + July 6, 2026 Removed: - All jurors who were summonsed for May 8, 2026, need to appear at the Oxford County Superior Court @ 8:30 a.m. for jury selection. - May 6, 2026

entry.title: Page updated: Maine Judicial Branch Jury Status Notices
entry.content:
This page's content changed since the last check. Visit the page directly to review the update.
What changed (text excerpt): Added: + Aroostook Superior Court- Caribou + Panel #4, State v. Kaylan Hartin- Brown, jurors please report to the Caribou Court on Wednesday July 8, 2026 by 9a. + July 7, 2026 Removed: - Aroostook County Superior Court- Caribou - Following Jurors please report to the Caribou Court on Monday, July 6, 2026 by 9a for jury selection - 3,4,10,12,13,14,16,17,20,24,29,30,37,38,39,44,45,51,53,55,58,59,62,64,66,68,70,73,77,79,80,81,87,91,94,95,101,103,104,105,107,117,120,121,123,125,126,128,129,132,133,135,136,141,147,158,165,166,167,173,174,183,185,191,194,201,210,217,220,221,222,229,242,244,247,249,256,260,282,283,286,289,298,301, - 305,307,309,311,317,323, 324 - Thank you,

entry.title: Page updated: Maine Judicial Branch Jury Status Notices
entry.content:
This page's content changed since the last check. Visit the page directly to review the update.
What changed (text excerpt): Added: + **July Jury Selection will be Thursday, July 9th at 9:00 a.m. + The following jurors do not need to report for selection on July 9th and August jury selections 11, 14, 26, 55, 69, 81, 82, 85, 126, 142, 165, 169, 178, 186, 192. Your service is complete. + **Please note that August dates have changed: Housekeeping will be held on Wed Aug 5th at 9am (approx 1 hr),Jury Selection Thurs Aug 6th at 9am and Fri Aug 7th at 9am. Plan to appear unless the Clerk has told you that you do not need to report. Thank you.** + All jurors summonsed for July jury selection, please report to the Capital Judicial Center on Thursday, July 9, 2026, at 8:30 AM. + Waldo County Superior Court - Belfast + All + Grand Jurors + are to report on Thursday July 23 and Friday July 24 at 8:30 am. Upon arrival please check in with the Jury Officer outside Courtroom #1. + If you have any questions, please call 338-3107 Monday through Friday between 8 am and 4 pm. + PROHIBITION OF ELECTRONIC DEVICES: + Please be advised that pursuant to Administrative Order JB-20-01, use of electronic devices during trial or while in deliberations are prohibited and all devices will need to be temporarily surrendered. During jury selection, all devices must be turned off. + July 8, 2026 Removed: - **July/August Traverse Jury** Will need to report for Jury Housekeeping on Wed July 8th at the time on your summons. Jurors #1-100 at 9am, Jurors #101-200 at 11am. Jury Selection will be held on Thurs [diff truncated]

entry.title: Page updated: Maine Judicial Branch Jury Status Notices
entry.content:
This page's content changed since the last check. Visit the page directly to review the update.
What changed (text excerpt): Added: + All July/August Traverse Jurors are to check the jury status website or phone line on Friday, July 10th after 5pm for further information and reporting instructions. + July 8, 2026 Removed: - All July/August Traverse Jurors are to report to the York Judicial Center in Biddeford on Monday, July 6th for a one hour orientation at the time listed on your summons. - Grand Jurors are to report to the York Judicial Center in Biddeford for orientation/selection on Tuesday, July 7th at 8:30am. - June 30, 2026

entry.title: Page updated: Maine Judicial Branch Jury Status Notices
entry.content:
This page's content changed since the last check. Visit the page directly to review the update.
What changed (text excerpt): Added: + Penobscot County Superior Court + All jurors summonsed for June/July jury selection, unless excused, please report to the Penobscot Judicial Center, 78 Exchange Street, Bangor on Friday, July 10, 2026, at 9:00 AM. Thank you and have a pleasant evening. + July 10, 2026

entry.title: Page updated: Maine Judicial Branch Jury Status Notices
entry.content:
This page's content changed since the last check. Visit the page directly to review the update.
What changed (text excerpt): Added: + July 2026 jurors: if your juror number is listed in this message, please report to the Capital Judicial Center on Friday, July 10, 2026 at 8:15 AM. Please listen carefully to see if you are to report on July 10 at 8:15: + Juror #2, 3, 6, 7, 9, 11, 12, 14, 15, 16, 19, 20, 22, 24, 25, 26, 27, 28, 30, 31, 32, 34, 38, 42, 43, 44, 45, 49, 51, 52, 53, 54, 58, 59, 70, 71, 72, 75, 76, 77, 78, 79, 80, 81, 82, 83, 84, 85, 87, 88, 91, 94, 95, 97, 99, 100, 102, 104, 105, 107, 108, 111, 112, 113, 114, 119, 120, 122, 123, 124, 125, 126, 128, 134, 135, 136, 137, 144, 145, 150, 151, 152, 153, 154, 155, 156, 157, 158, 159, 160, 162, 163, 166, 167, 169, 170, 172, 173, 174, 177, 178, 179, 181, 183, 184, 185, 188, 191, 193, 194, 195, 197, 204, 205, 206, 207, 208, 210, 212, 215, 219, 224, 226, 227, 230, 231, 232, 234, 236, 238, 243, 245, 246, 250, 254, 256, 258, and juror #260. If your juror number is NOT listed here, please do NOT report to jury duty on July 10. If your juror number is NOT listed here, then your jury duty is done. Thank you. Removed: - All jurors summonsed for July jury selection, please report to the Capital Judicial Center on Thursday, July 9, 2026, at 8:30 AM. - Thank you and have a pleasant evening.

entry.title: Page updated: Maine Judicial Branch Jury Status Notices
entry.content:
This page's content changed since the last check. Visit the page directly to review the update.
What changed (text excerpt): Added: + All July 2026 trial jurors are to report for jury selection at 8:30AM on Monday, July 13th. + July 10, 2026 + July 10, 2026 + Piscataquis Judicial Center - Dover-Foxcroft, Maine + All Jurors need to report on Wednesday, August 5, 2026 at 8:30 am. Please call 564-2240 if you have any questions. + If there is inclement weather, please go to www.courts.maine.gov for updates. + PROHIBITION OF ELECTRONIC DEVICES: Please be advised that pursuant to Administrative Order JB-20-01, use of electronic devices during trial or while in deliberations are prohibited and all devices will need to be temporarily surrendered. During jury selection, all devices must be turned off. Removed: - Jurors selected in the matter of State v Jordan are to report for trial at 9:00am on Monday July 6th. Please report to the Jury Assembly room on the second floor of the Cumberland County Courthouse in Portland. - All June 2026 trial jurors who have not been selected for the case mentioned previously are no longer expected to check this website or report for jury selection. Your jury service is now completed for 5 years with the thanks of the court! - June 23, 2026

entry.title: Page updated: Maine Judicial Branch Jury Status Notices
entry.content:
This page's content changed since the last check. Visit the page directly to review the update.
What changed (text excerpt): Added: + All July/August Jurors are to + check the website or call the juror information line on Monday, July 13th after 12pm + for further information and reporting instructions. + July 10, 2026 Removed: - All July/August Traverse Jurors are to check the jury status website or phone line on Friday, July 10th after 5pm for further information and reporting instructions. - July 8, 2026

entry.title: Page updated: Maine Judicial Branch Jury Status Notices
entry.content:
This page's content changed since the last check. Visit the page directly to review the update.
What changed (text excerpt): Added: + All jurors selected for Panel A, Mitchell VS. Inland Hospital and Northern Light Healthcare, please report to the Capital Judicial Center on Monday, July 13, 2026, at 8:30 AM. Thank you and have a pleasant evening. Removed: - July 2026 jurors: if your juror number is listed in this message, please report to the Capital Judicial Center on Friday, July 10, 2026 at 8:15 AM. Please listen carefully to see if you are to report on July 10 at 8:15: - Juror #2, 3, 6, 7, 9, 11, 12, 14, 15, 16, 19, 20, 22, 24, 25, 26, 27, 28, 30, 31, 32, 34, 38, 42, 43, 44, 45, 49, 51, 52, 53, 54, 58, 59, 70, 71, 72, 75, 76, 77, 78, 79, 80, 81, 82, 83, 84, 85, 87, 88, 91, 94, 95, 97, 99, 100, 102, 104, 105, 107, 108, 111, 112, 113, 114, 119, 120, 122, 123, 124, 125, 126, 128, 134, 135, 136, 137, 144, 145, 150, 151, 152, 153, 154, 155, 156, 157, 158, 159, 160, 162, 163, 166, 167, 169, 170, 172, 173, 174, 177, 178, 179, 181, 183, 184, 185, 188, 191, 193, 194, 195, 197, 204, 205, 206, 207, 208, 210, 212, 215, 219, 224, 226, 227, 230, 231, 232, 234, 236, 238, 243, 245, 246, 250, 254, 256, 258, and juror #260. If your juror number is NOT listed here, please do NOT report to jury duty on July 10. If your juror number is NOT listed here, then your jury duty is done. Thank you.

entry.title: Page updated: Maine Judicial Branch Jury Status Notices
entry.content:
This page's content changed since the last check. Visit the page directly to review the update.
What changed (text excerpt): Removed: - Sagadahoc County Superior Court - Jurors who were summonsed to report to The West Bath District Court on June 26th and on dates throughout July for Jury Duty in Sagadahoc County, please be advised that - June & July Jury Duty in Sagadahoc County has been cancelled - . - Please contact the Clerk's Office with any further questions by calling (207) 442-0200 between the hours of 8:00 AM and 4:00 PM, Monday through Friday. - June 23, 2026

entry.title: Page updated: Maine Judicial Branch Jury Status Notices
entry.content:
This page's content changed since the last check. Visit the page directly to review the update.
What changed (text excerpt): Added: + **The following jurors do not need to report for selection for August jury selections 11, 14, 26, 55, 69, 81, 82, 85, 126, 142, 165, 169, 178, 186, 192. Your service is complete. + **Jurors chosen for State v Duval Trial please report on Thurs July 16th and July 17th at 8:30am. + **Jurors chosen for State v Fournier Trial please report on Fri July 24th at 8:30am. + There are no jurors needed at the the York Judicial Center for the week of July 13th. + All July/August traverse jurors are to check the jury status website or phone line on Friday, July 17th after 5pm for further information and reporting instructions. + July 13, 2026 Removed: - **July Jury Selection will be Thursday, July 9th at 9:00 a.m. - The following jurors do not need to report for selection on July 9th and August jury selections 11, 14, 26, 55, 69, 81, 82, 85, 126, 142, 165, 169, 178, 186, 192. Your service is complete. - All July/August Jurors are to - check the website or call the juror information line on Monday, July 13th after 12pm - for further information and reporting instructions. - July 10, 2026

entry.title: Page updated: Maine Judicial Branch Jury Status Notices
entry.content:
This page's content changed since the last check. Visit the page directly to review the update.
What changed (text excerpt): Added: + LINCOLN COUNTY GRAND JURY + Please report to the Lincoln County Courthouse located at 32 High Street in Wiscasset on Tuesday July 14, 2026 at 8:30 AM + All alternates were called in, and all must appear. + Parking is available but it is limited. + If you have any questions, please call the clerk’s office at 882-6363 between the hours of 8AM and 4PM + July 13, 2026

entry.title: Page updated: Maine Judicial Branch Jury Status Notices
entry.content:
This page's content changed since the last check. Visit the page directly to review the update.
What changed (text excerpt): Added: + All jurors selected for Panel A, Mitchell VS. Inland Hospital and Northern Light Healthcare, please report to the Capital Judicial Center on Wednesday, July 15, 2026, at 8:15 AM. Thank you and have a pleasant evening. Removed: - All jurors selected for Panel A, Mitchell VS. Inland Hospital and Northern Light Healthcare, please report to the Capital Judicial Center on Monday, July 13, 2026, at 8:30 AM. Thank you and have a pleasant evening.

entry.title: Page updated: Maine Judicial Branch Jury Status Notices
entry.content:
This page's content changed since the last check. Visit the page directly to review the update.
What changed (text excerpt): Added: + ***Jurors selected in the matter of + State v Vasquez + are to check back on Tuesday, July 21st after 4:00pm for reporting instructions for trial on Wednesday, July 22nd. + ***Jurors selected in the matter of + State v Maley + are to check back on Friday, July 31st after 4:00pm for reporting instructions for trial on Monday, August 3rd. + ***Jurors selected in the matter of + State v Strout + are to check back on Tuesday, August 4th after 4:00pm for reporting instructions for trial on Wednesday, August 5th. + All remaining + July 2026 Jurors + are excused, your service is now complete with the thanks of the court. + All + August 2026 Jurors + are to report for Jury Selection on August 10th, 2026 at 8:30am. Removed: - All July 2026 trial jurors are to report for jury selection at 8:30AM on Monday, July 13th. - Thank you!

entry.title: Page updated: Maine Judicial Branch Jury Status Notices
entry.content:
This page's content changed since the last check. Visit the page directly to review the update.
What changed (text excerpt): Added: + All jurors selected for Panel A, Mitchell VS. Inland Hospital and Northern Light Healthcare, please report to the Capital Judicial Center on Friday, July 17, 2026, at 8:15 AM. Thank you and have a pleasant evening. Removed: - All jurors selected for Panel A, Mitchell VS. Inland Hospital and Northern Light Healthcare, please report to the Capital Judicial Center on Wednesday, July 15, 2026, at 8:15 AM. Thank you and have a pleasant evening.

entry.title: Page updated: Maine Judicial Branch Jury Status Notices
entry.content:
This page's content changed since the last check. Visit the page directly to review the update.
What changed (text excerpt): Removed: - LINCOLN COUNTY GRAND JURY - Please report to the Lincoln County Courthouse located at 32 High Street in Wiscasset on Tuesday July 14, 2026 at 8:30 AM - All alternates were called in, and all must appear. - Parking is available but it is limited. - If you have any questions, please call the clerk’s office at 882-6363 between the hours of 8AM and 4PM - July 13, 2026

entry.title: Page updated: Maine Judicial Branch Jury Status Notices
entry.content:
This page's content changed since the last check. Visit the page directly to review the update.
What changed (text excerpt): Added: + All jurors selected for Panel A, Mitchell VS. Inland Hospital and Northern Light Healthcare, please report to the Capital Judicial Center on Monday, July 20, 2026, at 8:15 AM. Thank you and have a pleasant weekend. Removed: - All jurors selected for Panel A, Mitchell VS. Inland Hospital and Northern Light Healthcare, please report to the Capital Judicial Center on Friday, July 17, 2026, at 8:15 AM. Thank you and have a pleasant evening.

entry.title: Page updated: Maine Judicial Branch Jury Status Notices
entry.content:
This page's content changed since the last check. Visit the page directly to review the update.
What changed (text excerpt): Added: + are no longer expected to report for trial on Wednesday, July 22, 2026, at 8:30am as the case has resolved. + The following July/August Traverse Jurors are to report to the York Judicial Center in Biddeford on Monday, July 20th at 10:30am + 3, 7, 8, 11, 12, 14, 16, 17, 18, 26, 27, 32, 39, 40, 45, 46, 49, 50, 56, 57, 61, 62, 65, 66, 68, 75, 81, 83, 86, 92, 96, 98, 99, 105, 106, 107, 114, 137, 140, 141, 146, 147, 149, 152, 177, 178, 180, 186, 190, 191, 192, 197, 209, 210, 218, 219, 223, 227, 233, 235, 236, 238, 243, 246, 248, 249, 255, 256, 260, 262, 263, 265, 266, 267, 278, 282, 285, 286, 298 and 300. + All other July/August Traverse Jurors are to check the jury status website or juror line on Friday, July 24th after 5pm for further information and reporting instructions. + July 17, 2026 Removed: - are to check back on Tuesday, July 21st after 4:00pm for reporting instructions for trial on Wednesday, July 22nd. - There are no jurors needed at the the York Judicial Center for the week of July 13th. - All July/August traverse jurors are to check the jury status website or phone line on Friday, July 17th after 5pm for further information and reporting instructions. - July 13, 2026
